title: Application For Building Permit
description: Requirements and procedures for securing a building permit for constructions and renovations.
schedule: Monday 9:00 A.M - 5:00 P.M. (Flag Raising from 8:00 A.M. - 9:00A.M.) Tuesday to Friday, 8:30 A.M. to 5:00 P.M. (Morning Prayer 8:00 to 8:30 A.M.) No noon break

items: 2 copies of Lot Plan with certification from a Geodetic Engineer that the proposed building will not encroach the adjoining properties
7 sets of Building Plans (Structural, Electrical, Plumbing) with Site Development Plan indicating the set-back/yard distances at the front sides and with Perspective at page 1 of every set
4 copies of Bill of Materials and Cost Estimates
4 copies of Specification documents
4 copies of Title of Property (Transfer Certificate of Title), certified true copy
4 copies of Deed of Absolute Sale/Lease Contract/Contact to Sell
Consent and Authority from the owner if the TCT is not in the name of the applicant
4 copies of latest Tax declaration (Please refer to City Assessor’s Office for the issuance of the Certification)
4 copies of current Tax receipt of Real Property Tax payment
1 copy of Construction log Book
2 copies of Structural Design Computation w/ Seismic Analysis which conforms to the latest NSCP-for 2 storeys and above or 1 storey w/ attic/mezzanine/roof deck/penthouse
2 copies of Plate Load Test Analysis-for 3 storeys or 2 storeys w/ attic/mezzanine/roof deck/penthouse
2 copies of Environment Compliance Certificate/Environment and
Natural Resources (ENRO) Clearance-for communication towers and gas depot
1 copy of Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE) Clearance for Industrial Buildings
Duly filled-out and Notarized Building permit Application Forms (and Ancillary Permit Forms: Electrical, Mechanical, Plumbing, Fencing).
Area of Building = 83 sq. m.
Line and Grade - P 470.00
Building - P 671.00
Plumbing - P 112.00
Electrical - P 280.00
Fence - P 132.00

procedures.clientAction: Secure application forms and checklist Fill-up application forms (Building, Electrical, Mechanical, Plumbing forms)
Submit application form w/ all requirements
procedures.providerAction: Receive duly filled-out Building Permit application and all the listed requirements. Inform client of the schedule for inspection.
If application submitted lacks some requirements the application is returned to concerned party for compliance
Conduct inspection of site, evaluate/assess and process the Building Permit application

procedures.clientAction: Receive the plans and technical documents for correction
procedures.providerAction: If technical deficiencies are found, returned the plans & technical documents for correction

procedures.clientAction: Follow-up status of the application and submit required clearances (Zoning, Fire Safety Clearance, DENR, DOLE)
procedures.providerAction: Receive the required clearances. Receive the corrected plans and documents for review and re-evaluation

procedures.fee: Per assessment and schedule of Fees stipulated in the NBC

procedures.clientAction: Pay the corresponding fees at the City Treasurer’s Office
procedures.fee: Refer to Box A in the requirements tab

procedures.providerAction: Final Evaluation and approval of the application

title: Application For Temporary Electrical Permit
description: Requirements for securing a temporary electrical permit for indigents.
schedule: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Daily (No noon break) excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays. On Mondays provision of services starts after flag raising.
whoMayAvail:
1. Indigents who need temporary electrical connection at their residences
2. Indigents not covered by Iligan City Resettlement Projects

items: Filled up forms
Certificate of Indigency from applicant's barangay
Photo copies of Land Title & Tax Declaration

procedures.clientAction: Present Certificate of Indigency and Tax Declaration.
procedures.providerAction: Require Certificate of Indigency and Tax Declaration from the applicant
Issue list of requirements & forms to be filled-up and complied. Instruct applicant how how to fill-up the forms.

procedures.clientAction: Pay the Temporary Electrical Permit Fee at the cashier.
procedures.providerAction: Inform client to pay to the cashier of the Temporary Electrical Permit Fee for processing the request.

title: Application for Locational Clearance Prior to Building Permit
description: Requirements for securing a locational clearance prior to applying for a building permit.
schedule: Monday 9:00 A.M - 5:00 P.M. (Flag Raising from 8:00 A.M. - 9:00A.M.) | Tuesday to Friday, 8:30 A.M. to 5:00 P.M. (Morning Prayer 8:00 to 8:30 A.M.) | No noon break

items: Filled up Zoning Application form
Notarized Zoning Application
Money Order form from Post Office

requirements.groupName: Zoning / Locational Clearance Schedule of Fees
items: Single Residential (P100,000 and Below): P200 x .01
Single Residential (Over P100,000 to P200,000): P400
Single Residential (Over P200,000): P500 + 1/10 of 1% in excess of P200,000
Apartment/Townhouses (P500,000 and Below): P1,000
Apartment/Townhouses (Over P500,000 to P2M): P1,500
Apartment/Townhouses (Over P2M): P2,500 + 1/10 of 1% of cost in excess of P2M
Dormitories (P2M and below): P2,500
Dormitories (Over P2M): P2,500 + 1/10 of 1% of cost in excess of P2M
Institutional (Below P2M): P2,000
Institutional (Over P2M): P2,000 + 1/10 of 1% of cost in excess of P2M
Commercial/Industrial (Below P100,000): P1,000
Commercial/Industrial (Over P100,000 - P500,000): P1,500
Commercial/Industrial (Over P500,000 - P1M): P2,000
Commercial/Industrial (Over P1M - P2M): P3,000
Commercial/Industrial (Over P2M): P5,000 + 1/10 of 1% of cost in excess of P2M
Special Uses/Projects (Below P2M): P5,000
Special Uses/Projects (Over P2M): P5,000 + 1/10 of 1% of cost in excess of P2M

procedures.clientAction: Customer/Applicant to apply Zoning Clearance with complete document in support to the application such as building permit form with set of technical drawings, land ownership and other documents.
procedures.providerAction: Receive and Evaluate building permit documents.
procedures.fee: Varies (See Schedule of Fees in Requirements tab)

procedures.providerAction: If no site inspection, issue zoning application form and assess zoning fees. If document is not complete, return the document to applicant/Customer. If with site inspection (prior assessment of zoning fees).

procedures.clientAction: Fill up Zoning Application forms and notarize. Pay Zoning Fees in a form of PMO/Cheques to bank/post office.
Submit notarized application forms / Zoning Fees in a form of PMO/Cheques.
procedures.providerAction: Process the Application and forward to DZA for decision/approval.
